pdf_summary.pdf_type: scanned image PDF (no extractable text via pdftotext)
pdf_summary.ocr_method: pypdfium2 render @ scale=2.0 + multimodal Read tool (Claude vision)
sections_covered: Usluge izabranog doktora (A01 preventive, A02 curative, X01-X03 interventions)
Usluge izabranog ginekologa (C01 preventive, C02 curative, X01-X03 gyn interventions)
Centar za plućne bolesti i TBC (G01, G02, X01-X03 TBC)
Centar za mentalno zdravlje (H01 psihijatra, H02 psihologa, H04 socijalnog radnika, H09 mobilni tim)
Centar za djecu sa posebnim potrebama (I01 preventive, I02 kurative, I03 defektolog/logoped)
Centar za dijagnostiku - RTG i UZ (J01 radiologa, J06 radiology, J07 ultrasound, J11 stomatološki RTG)
BES vakcinacije i sanitarni pregledi (17 stavki)

code_strategy.code_collision_avoidance: PDF uses A01XXX, X01XXX etc. that collide with the Cetinje state nomenclature already imported for clinic 88. Since clinic_medical_services is keyed by (clinic_id, ...), the codes themselves do not conflict at the database level. To keep services semantically distinct in medical_services, item names in EN are differentiated where Cetinje had different services for the same code prefix.
code_strategy.prefix_HN_: Codes that would mismatch the Cetinje meaning are stored with HN_ prefix in clinic_medical_services.code (e.g., HN_X01001 for Foreign Body Removal from Ear). Original codes preserved where unambiguous.

batches.notes: Single batch consolidation. All 475 OCR-extracted items consolidated. INSERT IGNORE handles dedupe with services already in medical_services from prior clinic imports.

category_assignments.Radiology and ultrasound: specialty-specific (e.g. cardiology for echo, ENT for sinus, peds for hip)
